nasb.text: Then he made the court: for the south side the hangings of the court were of fine twisted linen, one hundred cubits;

esv.text: And he made the court. For the south side the hangings of the court were of fine twined linen, a hundred cubits;

cnv.text: 他又做院子；南面，就是向南的方向，用撚的細麻做院子的幔幕，共四十四公尺。

ccb.text: 他用帷幔围成院子，南面的帷幔用细麻线织成，长四十六米。
